title: PTC, Inc. (PTC) CEO James Heppelmann on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: PTC, Inc. (PTC) CEO James Heppelmann on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: PTC ANNOUNCES FIRST FISCAL QUARTER 2022 RESULTS
text: BOSTON, Jan. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) today reported financial results for its first fiscal quarter ended December 31, 2021.  "Our fiscal 2022 is off to a solid start with our key operating and financial metrics showing strong performance.

title: PTC and Schaeffler Announce Strategic Alliance to Accelerate Digital Transformation Roadmap
text: BOSTON, Jan. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) and global automotive and industrial supplier Schaeffler today announced a new alliance that will see Schaeffler standardize on PTC solutions to deploy an integrated, end-to-end IT landscape. Schaeffler will also inform PTC's efforts to further develop and evolve market-specific standard solutions to better meet the needs of automotive and industrial companies.

title: PTC Gearing Up for Q1 Earnings: What is in the Offing?
text: PTC is likely to have reported higher year-over-year revenues in first-quarter fiscal 2022, driven by significant growth across all product segments and regions.

title: PTC Expands USAF Partnership, Inks 5-Year Definitive Contract
text: PTC augments its partnership with the United States Air Force as part of a five-year definitive contract for the deployment of PTC's Servigistics Service Parts Management SaaS solution.

title: PTC: A Compelling GARP Opportunity
text: PTC is a technology leader with significant growth potential ahead.

title: PTC Announces Servigistics Expansion with the U.S. Air Force
text: BOSTON, Jan. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) today announced that the United States Air Force (USAF) is expanding its use of PTC's Servigistics ® Service Parts Management SaaS solution for its supply chain modernization program, ESCAPE. The expansion is a five-year definitive contract consisting of a one-year base period and four one-year options that are worth up to $95 million if all options are exercised.

title: PTC: Ongoing Business Transition Underpins Longer-Term Growth Potential
text: PTC's latest investor day event offered plenty of cheer as its transition toward a subscription-based model remains intact.

title: PTC to Announce Fiscal Q1'22 Results on Wednesday, January 26th, 2022
text: BOSTON, Jan. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- PTC (Nasdaq: PTC) will release its fiscal 2022 first quarter results on Wednesday, January 26 th after the stock market closes. Senior management will host a live webcast and conference call to review the results on Wednesday, January 26 th at 5pm Eastern Time.
